fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of document that you are about to create.
The program automatically retrieves the document type from the sales header.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the document number.
The program automatically retrieves the document number from the No. field on the sales header.
The program uses the document number to link the sales header with the sales lines.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the line number.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different sales lines.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the entry. The description depends on what you chose in the Type field. If you did not choose Blank, the program will fill in the field when you enter something in the No. field.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item will be specified on the line.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Contains the line discount percentage that is valid for the item quantity on the line.
If sales line discounts are set up for the customer, then the Line Discount % field may be automatically updated when you change the line quantity, or when another line discount criterion changes.
For more information, see Sales Line Discounts.
If sales line discounts are not set up for the customer, then the Line Discount % field is cleared when you change the line quantity, and you must manually reenter a line discount percentage.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount amount that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, including VAT, for this line.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Inv. Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total calculated invoice discount amount for the line.

fields.name: Drop Shipment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if your vendor ships the items directly to your customer.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the currency code for the amount on this line.
The program automatically retrieves the currency code from the sales header.
The program uses the currency code and the posting date on the sales header to find the relevant exchange rate in the Currency Exchange Rate table. This is the exchange rate that the program will use to convert amounts on the sales lines to LCY and/or an additional reporting currency.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that serves as a base for calculating the Amount Including VAT field.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, excluding any invoice discount amount, that must be paid for products on the line.

fields.name: IC Partner Ref. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item or account in your IC partner's company that corresponds to the item or account on the line.

fields.name: IC Partner Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the IC partner. If the line is being sent to one of your intercompany partners, this field is used together with the IC Partner Ref. Type field to indicate the item or account in your partner's company that corresponds to the line.

fields.name: IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the code of the intercompany partner that the transaction will be sent to.

fields.name: IC Transaction No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the IC transaction number.

fields.name: Transaction Source
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which company created the transaction.
The following table describes the two options.


Option


Description


Rejected by current company

The transaction was received from the IC partner and rejected by the current company.


Created by current company

The transaction was created by the current company.

fields.name: IC Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the IC partner. If the line is being sent to one of your intercompany partners, this field is used together with the IC Partner Ref. Type field to indicate the item or account in your partner's company that corresponds to the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code to use to determine the unit price. If the Sales Unit of Measure field on the item card is filled in, the value is automatically copied from that field when the sales line is filled in.

fields.name: Requested Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that your customer has asked the items on this order line to be delivered.

fields.name: Promised Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: There are a number of tables and fields that are not currently documented. There is no specific Help for these tables and fields.
